title: Electro Boy
overview: A regular kid named Johnny Bolt suddenly finds that he can control electricity. Soon enough, he starts testing the limits of his newfound powers.

title: Kasey
overview: As soon as he's released from prison, Johnny meets up with his old supervillain friends, who try to pull him into a very intriguing gem heist.

title: Man Mountain
overview: Things don't go as planned with the heist, and Johnny and the crew end up getting chased by cops and superheroes through the streets of San Francisco.

title: The Praetorian
overview: Johnny and his friends are confronted by Praetorian, a superhero who relishes using his seemingly endless abilities to punish them.

title: The Heat
overview: In Chicago, Carmine introduces Johnny and Kasey to the other supervillains. They've all been chosen for their specific powers and their nameless status.

title: The Gladiator
overview: Carmine and his crew steal a plane and fly off to rescue TK, who's on a heavily guarded aircraft protected by Gladiator.

title: The Supermax
overview: While waiting for the final member of their crew to show up, Carmine shares his plan with everyone else and gives them one last chance to drop out.

title: The Union of Justice
overview: The night before hitting the Union of Justice headquarters, Johnny and Kasey have an early celebration and vow to walk away from crime after this heist.

title: Count Orlok
overview: While confronting their old friend Praetorian, Carmine and the crew realize they've made a major miscalculation and have to think on their feet.

title: Carmine
overview: Johnny's old supervillain buddies take him out for a celebration and as usual, try to pull him into one last harebrained job.

title: Casino Grand Granite
overview: To save Carmine, Johnny tries to get the crew back together for another heist he's planned using information he gathered while serving time in supermax.

title: The Bastard
overview: Kasey and Roddy disguise themselves as professors for a meeting with Christopher Matts while Carmine, Johnny, TK and Josh case the casino.

title: SUPER CROOKS
overview: Christopher Matts sends Praetorian to stop Johnny and his crew — but this time, the supervillains have Gladiator on their side.
